tracks.meaning: to make something brighter or more prominent by directing light upon it
to emphasize or draw attention to something important in speech or writing
to select or mark text or an area on a screen to indicate it for further action
to print or mark text in a brighter color or with special formatting to make it stand out
a bright beam of stage lighting directed at a performer or specific area of the stage
a notable or memorable moment or achievement that stands out as significant
to be the most interesting or exciting part of an event or experience
